# TcCO2 To PaCO2 Inference App

App URL: https://reblocke.github.io/tcco2-accuracy/
Repository: https://github.com/reblocke/tcco2-accuracy

Purpose:
Static research app for estimating a PaCO2 posterior distribution from an observed transcutaneous CO2 (TcCO2) value using the repository Python model in Pyodide.

Not clinical software:
This is research software only. It is not intended for diagnosis, treatment, or clinical decision-making.

Inputs:
- TcCO2 value in mmHg.
- Hypercapnia threshold in mmHg, default 45.
- Clinical setting selector: all, ambulatory/PFT, ED/inpatient, ICU.
- Optional custom study table upload as CSV/XLSX.
- Optional custom binned PaCO2 prior upload as CSV/XLSX.

Outputs:
- PaCO2 median and prediction interval.
- Posterior probability that PaCO2 is at or above the selected threshold.
- TcCO2 threshold classification.
- Posterior distribution plot.

Privacy and runtime:
- No backend.
- No telemetry.
- No persistence.
- No patient-value URLs.
- User-entered values and uploads stay in the browser.
- JavaScript handles UI and plotting; Python remains the numerical source of truth.

Default assets:
- web/assets/data/conway_studies.csv is staged from Data/conway_studies.csv.
- web/assets/data/paco2_public_prior.csv is staged from Data/paco2_public_prior.csv.
- web/assets/data/bootstrap_params.csv is staged from artifacts/bootstrap_params.csv.
- web/assets/py/ is staged from src/tcco2_accuracy by make stage-web.

Citations:
- CHEST 2025 abstract DOI: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.chest.2025.07.3877
- ATS 2025 abstract DOI: https://doi.org/10.1164/ajrccm.2025.211.Abstracts.A2683
- Conway Thorax evidence synthesis DOI: https://doi.org/10.1136/thoraxjnl-2017-211466
